name: Kaizer

skills.name: Demon Soul
skills.description: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 deal extra damage to single targets.

skills.name: Vortex Brand
skills.description:
Throws a ricocheting blade in the target direction, damaging and slowing enemies hit.
The blade returns on hit, recovering Health and granting Movement Speed and Attack Speed.

skills.name: Blade Tempest
skills.description:
Slashes twice, dealing damage. The second slash launches enemies and increases the damage of the next Basic Attack.
Gains increased Health and Mana recovery, and Movement Speed when out of combat.

skills.name: Invincible Warrior
skills.description: Becomes enhanced, gaining max Health, Physical Attack, and Movement Speed, while blocking incoming damage and dealing damage over time to nearby enemies.

skillsZh.name: 修羅之魂
skillsZh.description: 普攻和2技能攻擊單一目標時造成額外傷害。

skillsZh.name: 迴旋之刃
skillsZh.description:
朝指定方向投擲可彈射的刀刃，造成傷害和減速效果。
成功命中敵人後刀刃返回，回復自身生命值並增加攻擊速度和移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 極刃風暴
skillsZh.description:
揮砍兩次，造成傷害，第二次額外造成擊飛效果，並強化下次普攻傷害。
脫離戰鬥後，提升生命值和法力值回復，增加移動速度。

skillsZh.name: 不滅魔軀
skillsZh.description: 自身進入強化狀態，強化期間，增加最大生命值、攻擊力和移動速度，抵擋每次所承受的傷害，對自身周圍一定範圍造成持續傷害。

tips: Build: Master Sword, Pure Sky, Sage's Sanctuary.
tipsZh: 鎧（對抗路）：梯度 S，勝率 51.62%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：宗師之力、純淨蒼穹、賢者的庇護.

patchHistory.change: Increased skill recovery and skill effect

patchHistory.detail: Kaizer's damage absorption makes him a great frontline tank. We've increased his damage output so he can also work well with an attack preset.

patchHistory.change: Balanced the strength of different builds.
patchHistory.detail: "Currently, Kaizer's overall strength is too high, especially when he purchases a lot of defensive equipment, making it difficult for opponents to counter him. Therefore, we've slightly reduced his strength when using defensive builds while maintaining his power with offensive builds."

patchHistory.change: Enhanced the damage bonus ratio for Skills 1 and 2, and adjusted the damage and stat bonus ratios for his Ultimate.
patchHistory.detail: As one of the first heroes in Honor of Kings, Kaizer may seem a little weak in comparison to the heroes that have joined since. We hope improving Kaizer's skill damage and stat bonuses will allow him, with the right equipment, to become a true fighter who balances damage output and sustain.

patchHistoryZh.change: 提升技能回復和技能效果

patchHistoryZh.detail: 「鎧吸收傷害的能力讓他能夠承擔起前排的職責，本次我們提高了他的攻擊力加成，讓他在選擇攻擊套裝時也能有不錯的表現。」

patchHistoryZh.change: 平衡不同出裝下的強度
patchHistoryZh.detail: 目前鎧的整體強度偏高，尤其在購買較多防禦裝備時，對手難以與其抗衡，因此我們適度降低了鎧出防禦套裝的強度，同時確保他在攻擊出裝下的強度。

patchHistoryZh.change: Enhanced the damage bonus ratio for Skills 1 and 2, and adjusted the damage and stat bonus ratios for his Ultimate.
patchHistoryZh.detail: As one of the first heroes in Honor of Kings, Kaizer may seem a little weak in comparison to the heroes that have joined since. We hope improving Kaizer's skill damage and stat bonuses will allow him, with the right equipment, to become a true fighter who balances damage output and sustain.

faqs.question: Is Kaizer good in current season?
faqs.answer: Kaizer is Tier S Tank with 51.62% win rate, 1.42% pick rate, and 0.14% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Kaizer build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Master Sword, Pure Sky, Sage's Sanctuary, Immovable - Sky Dome, Destiny, Ardent Dominion.

faqs.question: How to counter Kaizer?
faqs.answer: Pick Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin. Strong into Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji.

faqsZh.question: 鎧 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 鎧 為 S 梯度，勝率 51.62%、選取 1.42%、禁用 0.14%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 鎧 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：宗師之力、純淨蒼穹、賢者的庇護、不動・天穹、名刀・司命、熾熱支配.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 鎧？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Donghuang、Kui、Sun Bin。鎧 克制 Da Qiao、Diaochan、Daji。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji. Weak into: Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin.

guide.overview: Kaizer is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier S with 51.4% win rate and 1.6% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Kaizer: Basic Attacks and Skill 2 deal extra damage to single targets.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Blazing Cape, Boots of Resistance, Ominous Premonition, then complete Blood Rage, Sage's Sanctuary, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Cataclysm for stats that match Kaizer's Tank kit. Take Flash & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Vortex Brand → Blade Tempest → Invincible Warrior → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Invincible Warrior (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Vortex Brand, and Invincible Warrior on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Vortex Brand → Blade Tempest → Invincible Warrior → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Kaizer is a Tier S staple in high-elo (Diamond+) on the international server — worth mastering for climb. Pick rate 1.6% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Kaizer.
comparisons: Kaizer vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 0.9% more often globally. Choose Kaizer when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.
Kaizer vs Arthur (Tank, Tier S): Arthur is 1.5% pick / 50.5% WR. Kaizer has +0.8% WR vs Arthur in Camp data. Choose Kaizer when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Arthur for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Kaizer excels into Da Qiao, Diaochan, Daji. Avoid blind picking into Donghuang, Kui, Sun Bin without team peel.
